titleStmt.title: SII 17.684A: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 684A. (A.R. No. 628-A of 1904.) NĀGALĀPURAM, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: At the entrance into the north gōpura of the Vēdanārāyaṇasvāmin temple.
This inscription bears the same date as in No. 684 above and registers the document assigning lands for various items enumerated in the same inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirāja parameśvara gajapati
vibhāṭa gajapati sa kaṇṭha vibhāṭa suratrāṇa rājya sthā
panācārya śrī vīrakṛṣṇadevamahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā
ṉiṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 4 10 5ṉ meṟcellāṉiṉṟa subhānu samvatsarattu
makaraṉāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa cataiyattu
nāḷ śrījeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalamāṉa toṇṭai maṇṭalattu ca
dvragiri rājyattil tirattu nārāyaṇapurap paṟṟuk kuṉṟavattaṉak ko
ṭṭattu Arikaṇṭapuramāṉa ṉākalādeviyammaṉpurattup perumāḷ kariya māṇikkap perumāḷ tirukko
yiṟ ṉam Ātiṉātaṉ Ā kaḷappāḷar tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiya mutaliyaṉa putran ṇāta
Aridāsa mutaliyārāṉa teyvaṅkaḷ perumāḷ mutaliyārkku Immaṇṭalat
tu Ik koṭṭattu nākalāteviyammaṉpurattup piṟivāṉa nattam vayakkuvitta mutaliya�
yar koppaṇa kopiṉāta ruḷḷiṭṭārum tammayarāmāṇṭai yuḷḷiṭṭā rum
(mā)ṉavarāyar periya kopinātaruḷḷiṭṭārum vāḷavarāyar to kāṭaruḷḷiṭ ṭārum
nayiṉār vettirayār nallāruḷḷiṭṭārum mācaṟuvari rācāttampiccarruḷḷiṭṭārum veṅ
yarātittāruḷḷiṭṭārum Anantappar kayilāyamuṭaiyāruḷḷiṭṭārum piccar kāḷatti ṉātaru
ḷḷiṭṭārum Ivvaṉaivarummom Emmilicaintu nilap pakircci Ōlai kuṭutta paṭi muṉṉāḷ
cuvāmi kiruṣṇateva mahārāyar nākalātevi Ammaṉ purattait tiruppatiyākak kaṭṭaḷai yiṭuvittukku
tāṅkaḷ kariyamāṇikkattemperumāṉukkut taṅkaḷup(ai)yamākak kaiyṅkariyam paṇ
ṇa veṇṭit tirukkoyilukku teṟ kkum cuṟṟi Arccittu Eṅkaḷ
kaiyyile nilaṅkaḷ koṇṭu tiruvīti kaṭṭuvittu Emperumāṉ kayiṅkariyattukku Aṇṇama yyaṉ
ḷaiyum kṛṣṇarāya Eṅkaḷ kaiyyile taṉikkāṇiyākak koṇṭuviṭṭum Ippaṭi
kaḷile tāṅkaḷ kayiṅkariyam paṇṇi varukaiyile kṛṣṇadeva mahārāyar gajapatirā
jyattiṉ perile poṭṭaṉū yaḷavāka jayastambham poṭṭu Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa potu taṅ
kaḷ tamayaṉār vaṭamalaiya malaiyyaṉ ma cittam san=tāṣittu sevai paṇṇi svāmi
san=toṣittu Uṉakkeṉṉa veṇumeṉṟu keṭṭut tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟa svāmi rakṣittattile Oṉṟā
loṉṟu kuṟaiyillai devarirkku jayamāka veṇumeṉṟu kariyamāṇikkattem perumā
ṉukkuc ciṟitu koyiluḷatu ciṟitu kayiṅkariyamum paṇṇineṉ tevariṟkku
digvijayamāṉavuṭaṉe kariyamāṇikkat temperumāṉukku veṇṭiṉa kayiṅka
riyam kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇiyaruḷa veṉṟu viṇṇappañ ceykaiyil Appaṭiye sāmiyum
gajapatiyaiyum jayittu gajapatikumāraṉaḷavākak kaippiṭiyākap piṭittuk koṇ
ṭu poṭṭaṉūr siṁhādriyile jayastambham poṭṭu tirumpik kumpakoṇattukku mahāma
kattīrttattukku Arikaṇṭapuram vaḻiyāka Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa poḻutu Arikaṇṭapurattaiyum tāṅ
kaḷ kaṭṭi varukiṟa koyilaiyum pāttu Itu puṇya kṣetrameṉkiṟattaiyum Inta [stāna]t tile
śrīharibrahmāvukku matsyāvatāramāka vedopadeśam paṇṇiṉa stalameṉkiṟattaiyum
Atiṉāle Inta stalattile veda vedāraṇyam vedagirināthaṉeṉṟu prasi
ddhamāccuteṉkiṟattaiyum Itu divya kṣetrameṉkiṟattaiyum taṅkaḷ tamaiyaṉār vaṭama
laiyaṇṇakaḷ viṇṇappañ ceyya cuvāmiyum keṭṭu san=toṣittuk kariyamāṇikka
ttemperumāṉ koyiṟ tiruppaṇikku Iraṇṭulakṣam poṉṉum Appotu kuṭuttu
p piṉṉaiyum ceṉṟa poṉṉellām kuṭukkumpaṭiyum kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu Eḻu kopuramu
m matiḷkaḷum tirumalai meṟ koyil mutalāṉa tiruppaṇiyum tāṅkaḷe paṇṇumpaṭiyu
ṅ kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu Antappaṭiyile tāṅkaḷ paṇṇiṉa tirukkopuraṅkaḷ maṇṭapaṅka
ḷ tirumatiḷkaḷ Āḻvararkaḷ pākavatarkaḷ mutalāṉa bhaktapratiṣṭhaiyaḷ paṇṇiṉattai
yum tiṟ cūḻat tiruppāṭi veṭṭait tiru
tayum keṅkaṟi māka piratikṣa niṉṟayam paṇṇiṉattaiyum kaṇṭu Ivaiyilellā
ttukkum Emperumāṉ tiruvuḷa mukantu Emperumāṉ taṅkaḷukku kaliyuka meyyarāyt te
taṅkaḷa paṇṇiṉattaiyu(m)ṅkaṇṭu Ivarum mikutiyāka san=toṣit tivvū
rait tiruṉāmattuk kāṇiyākat tiruppatiyāka vemperumāṉuṭaiya tiruvārattai kaṭṭaḷaika
ḷum tāṉa mutalāṉa nirvākam Aṉaittuk kottukku Inta Ūrait tiruṉāmattukkāṇi yākac cey
tu tirutterkaḷ Oṭumpaṭiyum kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu tiruttert tiruṉāḷukkum ta ṟuk kuṭitta m Eḻu
ntaruḷukiṟa perumāḷ tirupāṭiveṭṭait tiruṉāḷukkum Emperumāṉuṭai viśeṣa tiruvārāta
ṉaikkum nācciyār tirumalai mel Emperumāṉ nātaṉ Ivarkaḷuṭaiya tiruvārātaṉai kaṭṭaḷaik
kum viṣu Ayana saṅkramam mutalāṉa tiṅkaṭ tivacaṅkaḷukkum maṟṟun tiruppaṇi mutalāṉa tirukkoyilu
kku veṇṭuñ cilavukkum maṟṟum Uṇṭāṉa Ilakkaikkuñ civitaṅkaḷukkum ṉāmayap peṭ
ṭai taṅkamum ṭamākak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu Ivvūr nitta Itu tiruppati tattiru
ṉāmakkāṇiyākak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa niṉṟayattukku paḻaiya Arikaṇṭapura meṉkiṟa perumākāteṉṟu
svāmi kṛṣṇa devamahārāyar tammuṭaiya mātā nāgalādeviyammaṉ perāle nāgalādevi yammaṉ pura
meṉṟu kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭut taṅkaḷukku nāgalādeviyammaṉpuram tāṉa mutalāṉa Aṉaittu kottuk kāṇi
yum pālittu taṅkaḷukku kṛṣṇarāya haridāsa mutaliyā reṉṟu tāṉappaṭṭa perum pālittu Ūriluḷḷa nila
koyilaṉaittuk kottup parikarattukkum nilavaṭaippākac cerkkumpaṭikkuk kaṭṭaḷai yiṭ
ṭu Ippaṭi tiruppatiyāy nattamum k kāṇiyum tirunāmakkāṇiyākaiyiṟ taṅkaḷ ta
Eṅkaḷai Uḷḷataṉaiyum rakṣikkaveṇṭi timma
tirumuka meṉkiṟa makimaiyai Uṇṭākki Irāyasamum tirumalai nāyanār perāle vantapaṭikku tiruma
laiṉāyakkaraiyu mellā Ūraiyum muṉṉiṭṭuk koṇṭu nāgalādeviyamma
ṉpuram tiruppati ye kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu vaṭa yeṉkiṟa makimai pokāmal nitta mum veṟupiṟit—
tu kaṭṭivittu nattattukku veṇṭiṉa kuṭimakkaḷaiyum ve
vaṭukaṉmutalāka nattattukku veṇṭum grāmadevataiyār koyiluṅ kaṭṭi
vittu grāmadevataikaḷaiyum pradiṣṭhaipaṇṇi nattattukku ṉīṅkal vācimāṉṉiyamu
ṅ kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu ṉīṅkal vāci māṉṉiyam maṭṭāṉāl Eṅkaḷukku naṭavāteṉkiṟattukkāka Eṅ
kaḷai Uḷḷataṉaiyum naṭatta veṇṭa nāgalādeviyammaṉpuran tiruṉāmakkāṇiyāyirukkavum
Irāyaruṭaiya mudraimanuṣyar vantu koyilaṉaittuk kottukkum mānnyakāṟarkku mānnya—
mākavum niṉṟa civitakāṟarkku nilavaṭaippākavum nilam vikkirayattaiyum tavirttu mu
draimanuṣyarkku Uṭaṉpaṭaccolli kāṇinilam paṇiya meṟkaṭṭaḷaiyiṭukai
yil vūrkku Oḻukiṉpaṭi kādi 5 100 8 10 3(?)ṉ piṟaku tāṅkaḷ kollaippaṟṟut tāṅka
nikki nikkiṉa nilamum Āka ku
tirukkoyilukku Avaśyam veṇṭiṉa tiruviti vāsattu
kkum tirukkuḷattiruttopput tirunaṉtavaṉam ceṅkaḻuṉīroṭai yiṭukiṟa vakaikku
m [ stāṉa] Iṟaiyili nampiyār Aṟcaṉā vṛtti cuṟṟukkoyiṟ parivāra devataiyaḷ pūcai mā
nnyam stāṉa mutal śrīvaiṣṇava mutal kaṇakkup piḷḷaikaḷ mānnyattukkum śrī bhaṇṭārattil
nāḷatuvaraikku Aṭaipaṭṭa nilam kuḻi 1000 4 100 3 10 3 periya natta Uḻavukāṇiyāy niṉṟa
nañcai nilam kuḻi 5 10l tāṅkaṟpaṟṟu kuḻi5 100 4 10 kollaippaṟṟu 3 10 Ūra
varuḻavukāṇi niṅkal vācimāṉṉiyamum piṟaku tāṅkaḷ kutirai kuṭaivaricai kaṟpit tattu
kkuk kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa māṉṉiyamum kuḻi 10 8[10 5] tantu grāma devataikaḷ mānnyamum kuṭi
makkaḷ mānnyamum kuḻi Āka kuḻi nikki kuḻi10000 7 1000 4 100 5 10m niṅkal vāci
kuṭaimānnyam kuḻi1000 8 100 Āka kuḻi 10000 2 100 6 10 tāṅkal paṟṟu kuḻi 4 100 4 10 kollaip
paṟṟu kuḻi [1000 3 10] cantiṟātittiyavaraiyum Aṟu pakuntu koḷḷukaiyil Ū
roṉṟāṉattai 3kku māṉiya taṅkaḷukkum tirumalaiya
ppar koṉeriyān kuṭuttattiṉ rai niṅkalākat taṅkaḷ karai kuḻi 4tva5
varum nilam nañ tāṅkaṟpaṟṟu kuḻi 100 8 10 6 kollaippaṟa
damaged
ñ certtuk koṇṭapaṭi
ttukkum nattattukkum Ellai Ellaikallukku
pperuvaḻiyiṟ kiḻ
poṭṭa Ellaikku
tirumañcaṉap peruvaḻi
paṭṭattāṉ melaivarampiṟ poṭṭa Ellaikkallukku meṟkum
ṭikollai kkum koṭiyampaṭṭu Ellai meṟkkum
rayanerikku vaṭakke nākalādeviyammaṉpurattu
kkum Ellaippirivākap poṭṭa Ellai kallukku meṟku kṛṣṇarāyapurak kollai
kkukkiḻakku Aṇṇarayyaṉ pāḷaiyattellaikkum Āmaṇakkampaṭṭellaikkum vaṭa
kkuc ciṟṟerikaṭai koppiṟ poṭṭa Ellaikkallukkum Ā p pāttāṉ kollai
kkum teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nañcaip paṟṟu nilam ceṉṟa paḷḷa
ttākkum paṭaiveṭṭuttākkum kaḻakkālum paḻai Aṭuveṉ pūṭṭai paṭṭi
ṭaiyum ciṟṟeri Etirvāyum Uṭpaṭa nañcaippaṟṟu ta Erikku Aṇṇarayya—
ṉ pāḷaiyattuṭaṉe certtukkoṇṭa tāṅkaṟpaṟṟu potukku ttu kuḻi 2 100 3 10 Āka
kuḻi 1000 2 10 7 tāṅkaṟpaṟṟu kuḻi9 10 2 kollaippaṟṟu kuḻi 75 Āka Inta nilam ta—
ṅkaḷ paṅkākavum Eṅkaḷ karaikku varum ṉilam nañcaippaṟṟu
kkum tāṅkaṟpaṟṟu kuḻi 3 100 5 10 9kku kollaippaṟṟu
vanattattuṭaṉe nattatto
kkukkiḻakku nāgalādeviyammaṉpurattu ttattukkum Ellai
koṭṭai Ellaikkallukkuk kiḻakkut tirumañcaṉapp(o)ruvaḻikku
koṭṭai Ellaikkallukkuk kiḻakku kiḻaṇṭai
Ellaikkallukkum Atukkut teṟkāka tirumañcaṉap peruvaḻikku
kīḻaṇṭaiyil Iraṭṭaiyaṉ paṭṭaṭaiyil muṉ maṇṭapattil melai varappiṟ poṭṭa
Ellaikkallukku kiḻakkum periya vaṭakke nākalātevi Ammaṉ purattuk
kollai ṇṭattukkollaikkum Ellaip pirivākap poṭṭa Ellai kallukku
kkiḻakku kāṭṭellai māṉa karuppaṉ ceri Ellai Ā
taṅkaḷukku śrīraṅkanāthaṉ tiru yāl prasāditta veṇpākkam ko—
yampaṭṭellaiyā kkum meṟku Aṇṇarayyaṉ pāḷaiyattuk kīḻai Ellaikkalluk—
kuk kiḻakkākat tāṅkalpaṟṟu putukkut taṅkaḷ paṅku nilamāka Aṇṇarayyaṉ pāḷai yattuṭa
ṉe certtukkoṇṭa kuḻi Iruṉūṟṟu muppatukku vaṭakku Atukkuk kiḻakkākak ke
ṟukkāl poṟattukku vaṭakku Āttukku māṉ paṭṭāka
ttellai kkut teṟku veḷḷaiyūr Ellai
kkum vaṭamaturaiyāṉa purattellaikkum me
nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattil nañcaippaṟṟu nilattil
p poṉṉukku
lattukkum Iraṭṭiyaḷ paṭṭaiyum tumpaikkuṇṭiṟ kāṇi kuḻikku
m kāl Ēri Etirvāyum kiḻaipaṭṭaṭai Uḷpaṭavum
kollaippaṟṟu kuḻi 3 1000 9 100 6 10 Āka Inta ṉilam
śrī kiruṣṇa Ellai piṟikaiyil taṅkaḷ karaikku nañcaippaṟṟu
Ellai piṟiñca nilattiṟkaṇṭakuḻi [1000]
veṇṭiṉa Inta
rainilam 10va 5 cāttaṉ koṭṭi paṭṭaṭai puñcai nilat
vilum tirukkuḷattilum Aṭaiypaṭṭu Inta nilaṅkaḷ
Inta Ayṉūṟu kuḻiyum kaḻitte Eṅkaḷ paṭṭaṭaiyil talainilatte
tāṅkaḷ peṟaveṇṭukaiyil Intak kuḻi Ayṉūṟum talainilattile
Eṅkaḷukku nilaṉ kuṟaiccalā meṉkiṟattukkākat tāṅkaḷ Eṅka—
yam paṇṇi rāyar tirukko kkum tirukkuḷattukkum kaṭ
ṭaḷaiyiṭṭut tiruppatic cervaiyāyt tāṉ sutantramāyap poyirukkaiyil
lum Eṅkaḷai veṇṭaṉāṅkaḷ viṭaveṇṭiṉa kuḻi Aṟuṉūṟṟukkum Inta
tiruppatic cervaiyāṉṉilattile yiṭupaṇṇikkoṇṭu Eṅkaḷ paṭṭaṭai
yiṟ taṅkaḷukkup peṟa veṇṭiṉa kuḻi Aṟuṉūṟum Eṅkaḷukku
ṉṉeḻuta
kurukularāyaṉ Eḻuttu
paramparaiyāka niṟkak kaṭaivomākavum tāṅkaḷ ṉukku Eṅkaḷ
ccittu Āṟukuḻi Uṭkuṟaic calā
ṉāgalādeviyammaṉpurattup po lāṅkaḷ paṅku
kka Āṟukuḻi Atikamākak kaiyil nilameṟṟiya
taṅkaḷukku taṅkaḷ paṅku
ttuk koṇṭa nilattiṟ kaḻaniyile Āṟukuḻiyum tāṅkaḷ
c certtu
ttak kaṭaivomākavum Ippaṭikku cammatittu nattap piṟivu nilam
kuṭuttom kṛṣṇarāya haridāsa mutaliyārāna Aṉaitta
kulai kaḷ perumāḷ mutaliyārkku nattam
damaged
nallāruḷḷiṭṭārum mācaṟuvar Irācarttam picca(r)ruḷḷiṭṭārum
veṅkayarātitta(r) ruḷḷiṭṭārum Aṉantappar kayilāya muṭaiyāru
ḷḷiṭṭārum piccar kāḷattiṉātaruḷḷiṭṭārum Ivvaṉaivarumom
Ippaṭikku Ivai Āvaṇimātam rāya kerappaṇa kopiṉātaruḷḷiṭ
ṭār Eḻuttu tampiyarāmā yuḷḷiṭṭāreḻuttu ṉavarāyar
tomi ṉātaruḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu vāṉavarāyar koṉe nātaruḷḷiṭṭār
Eḻuttu nallāruḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu Irācā
raya picca(r) ruḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu veṅkayarātitta(r) ruḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu
ppan kayilāyamuṭaiyāruḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu tirukkāḷatti ṉātaruḷḷiṭṭār
Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.684A by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
